parameters.query: Kitchen Sink Toilet HVAC moisture battery

parameters.template:
{% for e in ['binary_sensor.kitchen_sink','binary_sensor.down_toilet','binary_sensor.hvac'] %}{{ e }}={{ states(e) }} avail={{ not is_state(e,'unavailable') }} bat={{ states('sensor.'+e.split('.')[1]+'_battery') }}
{% endfor %}

{{ states.binary_sensor | selectattr('entity_id','in',integration_entities('govee_leak')) | rejectattr('entity_id','search','low_battery') | map(attribute='entity_id') | map('regex_replace','binary_sensor.','') | list | zip(states.binary_sensor | selectattr('entity_id','in',integration_entities('govee_leak')) | rejectattr('entity_id','search','low_battery') | map(attribute='state') | list) | list }}
{% for e in integration_entities('govee_leak') if e.startswith('binary_sensor') and not e.endswith('low_battery') %}{{ e.split('.')[1] }}={{ states(e) }} {% endfor %}

{% for e in integration_entities('govee_leak') if e.startswith('binary_sensor') and not e.endswith('low_battery') %}{{ e.split('.')[1] }}={{ states(e) }} (since {{ as_timestamp(states[e].last_changed) | timestamp_custom('%H:%M:%S') }}) {% endfor %}

{% for e in integration_entities('govee_leak') if e.startswith('binary_sensor') and not e.endswith('low_battery') %}{% if states(e) != 'unknown' %}{{ e.split('.')[1] }}={{ states(e) }} (changed {{ as_timestamp(states[e].last_changed) | timestamp_custom('%H:%M:%S') }}) {% endif %}{% endfor %}|| any_changed={{ integration_entities('govee_leak') | select('match','binary_sensor') | reject('search','low_battery') | map('states') | reject('eq','unknown') | list | length }}

{% for e in integration_entities('govee_leak') if e.startswith('binary_sensor') and not e.endswith('low_battery') %}{% if states(e) != 'unknown' %}{{ e.split('.')[1] }}={{ states(e) }}@{{ as_timestamp(states[e].last_changed)|timestamp_custom('%H:%M:%S') }} {% endif %}{% endfor %}

{% for e in integration_entities('govee_leak') if e.startswith('binary_sensor') and not e.endswith('low_battery') %}{% if states(e) != 'unknown' %}{{ e.split('.')[1] }}={{ states(e) }}@{{ as_timestamp(states[e].last_changed)|timestamp_custom('%H:%M:%S') }} {% endif %}{% endfor %}

{% set ns = namespace(wet=[]) %}{% for e in integration_entities('govee_leak') if e.startswith('binary_sensor') and not e.endswith('low_battery') %}{% if states(e)=='on' %}{% set ns.wet = ns.wet + [e.split('.')[1]+'@'+as_timestamp(states[e].last_changed)|timestamp_custom('%H:%M:%S')] %}{% endif %}{% endfor %}WET={{ ns.wet }} | latest_change={% for e in integration_entities('govee_leak') if e.startswith('binary_sensor') and not e.endswith('low_battery') %}{{ e.split('.')[1] }}:{{ states(e) }}@{{ as_timestamp(states[e].last_changed)|timestamp_custom('%H:%M:%S') }} {% endfor %}
